name: Iron Wire Fruit Basket with Banana Hanger Black - Threshold™: Traditional Round Banana Stand & Fruit Bowl Holder
description: The Iron Wire Fruit Basket with Banana Hanger from Threshold™ ensures your assortment of fruits stay in one convenient place. Made from metal, this fruit basket features a round bowl with a wide mouth to store a variety of fruits, while the airy design allows air to naturally ripen and keep fruits fresh. Plus, it's designed with a hanger at the top to let you easily hang a banana bunch from it. In a black finish, it features a classic wired design that easily coordinates with a variety of decor styles.
